title: THANK YOU SO MUCH MENTORS!
author: XL
message: Thank you for the incredible and amazing year that you have given us, you genuinely made me feel like at home in a country which is anything but home, all the activities and study session that you have organised for us made me more and more familiar with Amsterdam, and genuinely made it a city that I will forever remember thanks to you. I wish you all all the best, and hopefully this is not the last time we talk
